prompt:
## Delegation Brief: T7 — Final Verification

### TASK
Read the full task file a...

tool_input.__tool_use_purpose: Read the authoritative task spec
Read the authoritative task spec

items.Text:
# Task 7: Final verification

## What to do
T1–T6 の成果物を統合した状態で最終検証を行う。build / test / lint / browser-verify / TUI 目視を一括実行し、結果を evidence にまとめる。

## Expected outcome
- `go test ./...` が全パッケージ green。
- `nix develop -c just lint` が zero issue。
- `just serve 9097` が起動し、以下 3 ページの screenshot が取得済み:
  - `/sessions/{id}` (markdown レンダリング + `<script>` エスケープ確認)
  - `/tools` (Top-N bar + scatter)
  - `/tools/{name}` (timeseries + pattern)
- TUI (`kapm monitor`) の Tools タブで mini-bar が表示される目視確認または snapshot 差分。
- Scope check: 新規 HTTP ルート無し / 新規 SSE 無し / 変更は #28 は session_detail 系のみ、#29 は tools 系 + TUI のみ。

## Context
- Plan: `.kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/plan.md` の Final Verification Wave に項目 F1–F5 あり。
- Evidence 保存先: `.kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/evidence/`
- AGENTS.md の制約: `just serve` で起動/停止、`.playwright-cli/` 配下にのみ screenshot 保存可能。

## References
- `.kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/plan.md`
- `AGENTS.md` — server 起動/停止 + playwright 保存先ルール
- `.kiro/skills/task-verification/SKILL.md` — 正直な evidence report の作法

## Recommended Agent
qa — build / test / lint / browser-verify の一気通貫検証。PASS/FAIL 評価を明示的に返す役割に最適。

## Dependencies
- T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6 すべて

## Parallelization
- Wave: 4
- Blocks: なし (最終)

## QA Scenarios

**Scenario: Build + test + lint**
Tool: bash
  Steps:
    ```
    cd /home/dev/myproject
    go build ./...
    go test ./...
    nix develop -c just lint
    ```
  Expected: 全コマンド exit 0、テスト FAIL 無し、lint warning 無し。
  Evidence: .kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/evidence/task-7-build-test-lint.md

**Scenario: WebUI end-to-end screenshots**
Tool: browser-verify
  Steps:
    ```
    just serve 9097
    mkdir -p .playwright-cli
    npx @playwright/cli@latest screenshot --filename .playwright-cli/F3-sessions.png http://127.0.0.1:9097/sessions/{sample-id}
    npx @playwright/cli@latest screenshot --filename .playwright-cli/F3-tools.png http://127.0.0.1:9097/tools
    npx @playwright/cli@latest screenshot --filename .playwright-cli/F3-tool-detail.png http://127.0.0.1:9097/tools/{sample-name}
    just serve-stop
    ```
  Expected: 3 PNG が生成され、各画像に期待表示 (markdown / charts / table) が写っている。
  Evidence: .kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/evidence/task-7-screenshots.md (PNG を evidence/ にコピーして参照)

**Scenario: Scope check**
Tool: bash
  Steps:
    ```
    cd /home/dev/myproject
    git fetch origin
    git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD | sort
    git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD
    ```
  Expected: 変更ファイル一覧が以下 16 ファイル**以内**に収まること:
    - `go.mod`
    - `go.sum`
    - `internal/serve/server.go`
    - `internal/serve/server_test.go`
    - `internal/serve/templates/layout.html`
    - `internal/serve/templates/session_detail.html`
    - `internal/serve/templates/tools.html`
    - `internal/serve/templates/tool_detail.html`
    - `internal/serve/assets/style.css`
    - `internal/serve/assets/js/charts-bootstrap.js` (新規)
    - `internal/serve/assets/js/tools-charts.js` (新規)
    - `internal/serve/assets/js/tool-detail-charts.js` (新規)
    - `internal/monitor/metrics.go`
    - `internal/monitor/metrics_test.go`
    - `internal/monitor/tui_views.go`
    - `internal/monitor/tui_test.go` (snapshot 更新時のみ)
  それ以外 (`cmd/` / `internal/install` / `internal/convert` / `internal/hook` 等) への変更があれば **FAIL**。
  新規 `mux.HandleFunc` / 新規 `/sse` ルートが server.go で検索して 0 件 (`grep -n 'mux.HandleFunc' internal/serve/server.go` が変更後に増えていないこと)。
  Evidence: .kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/evidence/task-7-scope-check.md

**Scenario: TUI manual check (best-effort)**
Tool: bash + manual
  Steps:
    1. ローカルで `go run ./cmd/kapm monitor` を起動 (CI では skip 可)。
    2. Tools タブに遷移し、各行に `█` のバーが表示されることを目視。
    3. 取れればターミナル screenshot を evidence に添付、取れなければ snapshot test の pass ログで代替。
  Expected: bar 列が見える、あるいは既存 snapshot test (`TestTUI*`) が更新後も green。
  Evidence: .kiro/plans/2026-04-24-webui-md-render-and-tools-viz/evidence/task-7-tui.md

playwright-cli - run playwright mcp commands from terminal

Usage: playwright-cli <command> [args] [options]
Usage: playwright-cli -s=<session> <command> [args] [options]

Core:
  open [url]                  open the browser
  attach [name]               attach to a running playwright browser
  close                       close the browser
  goto <url>                  navigate to a url
  type <text>                 type text into editable element
  click <target> [button]     perform click on a web page
  dblclick <target> [button]  perform double click on a web page
  fill <target> <text>        fill text into editable element
  drag <startElement> <endElement> perform drag and drop between two elements
  hover <target>              hover over element on page
  select <target> <val>       select an option in a dropdown
  upload <file>               upload one or multiple files
  check <target>              check a checkbox or radio button
  uncheck <target>            uncheck a checkbox or radio button
  snapshot [element]          capture page snapshot to obtain element ref
  eval <func> [element]       evaluate javascript expression on page or element
  dialog-accept [prompt]      accept a dialog
  dialog-dismiss              dismiss a dialog
  resize <w> <h>              resize the browser window
  delete-data                 delete session data

Navigation:
  go-back                     go back to the previous page
  go-forward                  go forward to the next page
